summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Tuningfiles portal dashboard. All core features tested successfully with mock data integration.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with all stats cards (credits, pending orders, completed files, total spent)
Sidebar navigation works - all links navigate to correct pages (Dashboard, File Wizard, Configurator, Credits, Orders, Profile)
Language switcher toggles between German (DE) and English (EN) successfully
Configurator page with vehicle selection dropdowns (manufacturer, model, engine) working correctly
Tuning type cards selection and price calculation (Stage 1, Stage 2, Eco, Custom)
Orders page with order history table displaying mock data correctly
Credits page with current balance display and purchase packages selection
Profile page with tabs (personal, company, API) - all tabs functional
File Wizard page with 4-step indicator (Vehicle Selection, File Upload, Options, Review & Submit)
Quick action buttons from dashboard navigate correctly (New Request, Buy Credits, View Orders, Go to Configurator)
API key visibility toggle and copy functionality in Profile page
Responsive design elements and proper color scheme (red/black/grey)
